title: Colour Measurement and Mixture
description: Part of the Romance of Science Series, this volume provides an expanded version of a lecture series given by the author, Sir William de Wiveleslie Abney (1843-1920) at the Royal Society of Arts. Contents include sixteen chapters detailing the physical and chemical properties of visible light, color theory, and methods of measuring light. Work is illustrated with various spectra and depictions of instrumentation. It is digitized in its entirety.
author: Abney, William de Wiveleslie, Sir, 1843-1920
attribution_md:
Colour Measurement and Mixture
Part of the Romance of Science Series, this volume provides an expanded version of a lecture series given by the author, Sir William de Wiveleslie Abney (1843-1920) at the Royal Society of Arts. Contents include sixteen chapters detailing the physical and chemical properties of visible light, color theory, and methods of measuring light. Work is illustrated with various spectra and depictions of instrumentation. It is digitized in its entirety.
